# machinghypercubes in 10D would require (with this lazy aproach)

A 10D cube has 1024 vertices, so the max number of combinaision is 1024!
Yes that is a very big number, in fact that is even more bytes that in your hard drive !
Assuming that we use a flattened array with 1 byte per combinaision which is impossible !

1024! =
